article_meta.title: Classes of more than 70 students amid historic declines in test scores 02:12 â¢ Source: CNN Classes o

reasoning: The summary maintains neutral, clinical language and attributes evaluative statements to the NWEA study and its co-author. It does not adopt loaded or emotive framing from the source and avoids editorializing.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs like 'reveals,' 'analyzed,' and 'recommends' without interpretive slant.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All findings are clearly attributed to NWEA and its co-author; no new claims introduced.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Subjective views (e.g., recovery not linear/quick) are attributed to Dr. Lewis.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No dramatic or emotive phrasing; tone is measured.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or character judgments.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about unspoken intentions or feelings.
custom_reasoning.slant: Reflects the single research-focused perspective present in the source without overstating it.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Includes all key points and attributions present in the article's body.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Avoids loaded descriptors; uses factual terms.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Portrays findings consistent with the source without amplifying negativity.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Treats the research organization’s perspective as a source, not as inherently authoritative beyond attribution.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than the opinion-labeled source; refrains from adopting any opinionated tone.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Represents NWEA and its co-author; no other perspectives were presented in the article.
